stemHtml: When may the pilot disregard a Resolution Advisory (RA) issued by ACAS?

options.a: When following the RA would jeopardize the safety of the aircraft.
options.b: When ATC instructions are in conflict with RA`s indications.
options.c: Under no circumstances may a pilot disregard the indications provided by a RA.
options.d: When visually acquired information indicate that the RA is erroneous.
